templates.name: App-Shell Dashboard
templates.purpose: The "wire the chrome once" starter: a sidebar + top-bar + content frame a consuming project can copy to stand up any authenticated dashboard. Composes the golden side-nav, an app bar with brand/title/action icon-buttons, a stat row, and a card grid.

templates.name: Brief / Editorial Reading Layout
templates.purpose: A single-article reading scaffold: fixed brief-detail header with a back button over a narrow reading column with title, meta, the read/bookmark/vote/share actions bar, body sections, and a related-stories grid.

templates.name: Play & Learn Module
templates.purpose: A gamified learning-module page: app-shell chrome with the games-active side-nav and app bar, a hero intro band, a grid of daily game-card tiles plus game-mode-card tiles, and a weekly progress/streak block built from the golden progress bits.
